AboutPreview.label: About Me
AboutPreview.title: Focused on Type-Safe Code, Peak Performance, and Solid Architecture.
AboutPreview.summary: As an Information Systems student at Gunadarma University and independent developer, I craft end-to-end digital solutions. I translate business requirements into efficient, scalable, and maintainable software systems.

Skills.label: Technical Capabilities
Skills.title: Tech Stack & Engineering Specialties
Skills.subtitle: Modern tech ecosystem used to craft zero-latency responsive interfaces, scalable backends, and offline-first Android applications.
Skills.frontendDesc: Fast & responsive UIs built with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4.
Skills.backendDesc: Transactional data flow, REST/GraphQL APIs, Supabase PostgreSQL, and Prisma ORM.
Skills.mobileDesc: Offline-first mobile applications with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Room DB, Dagger Hilt, and ML Kit.
Skills.deliveryDesc: Clean Architecture, Git workflow, structured testing, and Vercel deployments.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Background profile and software engineering philosophy of Ahmad Hidayatullah.
AboutPage.label: Engineering Profile
AboutPage.title: About Ahmad Hidayatullah
AboutPage.intro: Information Systems student at Gunadarma University dedicated to crafting high-caliber software.
AboutPage.backgroundText: I believe great software engineering comes from combining ultra-fast runtime performance, clean data architecture, and intuitive user experiences.
AboutPage.philosophyText: Avoiding unnecessary complexity (over-engineering) and delivering concrete value that solves real-world problems.
AboutPage.principle1Desc: Maintainable, low-friction codebase powered by TypeScript & Kotlin type systems.
AboutPage.principle2Desc: Asset optimization, server component rendering, and smart caching for lightning-fast loads.
AboutPage.principle3Desc: Ensuring seamless, responsive interactions across desktop and mobile form factors.
AboutPage.aiWorkflowText: A structured method for turning concepts into production-grade software.
AboutPage.workflowStep1: Deep product requirements analysis & architecture planning.
AboutPage.workflowStep2: Database schema modeling, API contract definitions, and UI wireframing.
AboutPage.workflowStep3: Type-safe implementation in Next.js or Kotlin Jetpack Compose.
AboutPage.workflowStep4: Performance, security, and UI responsiveness testing.
AboutPage.workflowStep5: Automated production deployment via continuous integration.
AboutPage.goalsText: Contributing to large-scale software engineering teams, building high-integrity digital products, and expanding full-stack and mobile capabilities.
